children.heading: Determination of number
children.label: a Determination of number
children.text: The Secretary shall determine the number of appointments of officer candidates.

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: b Appointment
children.text: Appointment of officer candidates shall be made under regulations, which the Secretary shall prescribe, including regulations with respect to determining age limits, methods of selection of officer candidates, term of service as an officer candidate before graduation from the basic officer training program of the Administration, and all other matters affecting such appointment.

children.heading: Dismissal
children.label: c Dismissal
children.text: The Secretary may dismiss from the basic officer training program of the Administration any officer candidate who, during the officer candidate’s term as an officer candidate, the Secretary considers unsatisfactory in either academics or conduct, or not adapted for a career in the commissioned officer corps of the Administration. Officer candidates shall be subject to rules governing discipline prescribed by the Director of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Each officer candidate shall sign an agreement with the Secretary in accordance with regarding the officer candidate’s term of service in the commissioned officer corps of the Administration.section 3006(a)(2) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: That the officer candidate will complete the course of instruction at the basic officer training program of the Administration.

children.label: i
children.text: will accept an appointment, if tendered, as an officer; and

children.label: ii
children.text: will serve on active duty for at least four years immediately after such appointment.
standards for determining what constitutes a breach of an agreement signed under subsection (d)(1); and
procedures for determining whether such a breach has occurred.

children.heading: Repayment
children.label: f Repayment
children.text: An officer candidate or former officer candidate who does not fulfill the terms of the obligation to serve as specified under subsection (d) shall be subject to the repayment provisions of .section 3006(b) of this title
